name: 艺术模板
description: 艺术创作风格提示词模板

templates.name: 油画风格
templates.prompt: oil painting on canvas, {subject}, classical painting style, Rembrandt lighting, rich textures, dramatic chiaroscuro, museum quality, {art_period} inspiration
templates.negative: digital art, flat, cartoon, low quality

templates.name: 抽象艺术
templates.prompt: abstract art composition, {colors} color palette, geometric shapes, expressive brushstrokes, modern abstract painting, canvas texture, contemporary art style

templates.name: 水墨画
templates.prompt: Chinese ink wash painting style, {subject}, traditional Chinese art, minimalist, elegant brushstrokes, rice paper texture, {mood}, classical landscape or figure

templates.name: 插画风格
templates.prompt: digital illustration, {subject}, {style} style, detailed vector art, vibrant colors, clean lines, editorial illustration, magazine quality, modern design

templates.name: 3D渲染
templates.prompt: 3D rendered art, {subject}, {material} material, cinematic lighting, octane render, detailed textures, unreal engine, 4K, studio lighting setup

templates.name: 像素艺术
templates.prompt: pixel art, {subject}, retro game style, {palette} color palette, 16-bit era, {resolution}, nostalgic gaming aesthetic, detailed pixel work

templates.name: 浮世绘
templates.prompt: ukiyo-e style woodblock print, {subject}, traditional Japanese art, bold outlines, flat colors, {season} theme, classic ukiyo-e composition

templates.name: 蒸汽朋克
templates.prompt: steampunk art, {subject}, Victorian era machinery, brass and copper tones, gears and cogs, airships, {mood}, detailed steampunk aesthetic
